message:
test(rch): add comprehensive cargo test integration tests

Add 10 new integration tests for cargo test remote execution:
- test_cargo_test_remote_success: successful test execution (exit 0)
- test_cargo_test_remote_test_failures: test failures (exit 101)
- test_cargo_test_remote_build_failure: build error (exit 1)
- test_cargo_test_with_filter: filtered test execution
- test_cargo_test_with_test_threads: --test-threads flag handling
- test_cargo_test_signal_killed: OOM/signal kill (exit 137)
- test_cargo_test_toolchain_fallback: toolchain missing fallback
- test_cargo_test_classification: cargo test command classification
- test_cargo_nextest_classification: cargo nextest classification
- test_artifact_patterns_for_test_commands: test artifact patterns

Implements bead remote_compilation_helper-iyv1.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
